title: Tour of Binzhou
summary: The Tour of Binzhou is a single day road cycling race held annually in China. It is contested in September and is part of the UCI Asia Tour as 1.1 category event. Prior to 2025, the race was held over two days, holding a rating of 2.2.
text:
The Tour of Binzhou is a single day road cycling race held annually in China. It is contested in September and is part of the UCI Asia Tour as 1.1 category event. Prior to 2025, the race was held over two days, holding a rating of 2.2.
